resources.string: This app is in early alpha. You may see incomplete features, crashes, and changes without notice. Data and dates shown here may be inaccurate or outdated; accuracy and stability will improve in upcoming releases.
AI-generated content is not legal or regulatory advice. Always verify against official sources and current regulations.
I understand this is an alpha build: data may be inaccurate, the app may crash, and fixes will ship in future versions
